videoTitle: video-editing income report / results: Complete Guide (2026)

priorityFixes.issue: First 30 seconds may not establish a strong enough reason to keep watching
priorityFixes.fix: Open with the result first, then explain how you got there. Show the best moment from the video in the first 5 seconds.
priorityFixes.toolSuggestion: Re-edit intro in DaVinci Resolve or Premiere Pro

priorityFixes.issue: Viewers may drop off between the 2 and 4 minute marks
priorityFixes.fix: Add a pattern interrupt: cut to B-roll, change camera angle, or add an on-screen graphic at the 2-minute mark.

priorityFixes.issue: Title may not create sufficient curiosity or clearly state the benefit
priorityFixes.fix: Rewrite title to include a specific number or result: "I video-editing for 30 Days (Here Is What Happened)"

visualEnhancements.issue: Flat or inconsistent colour across clips
visualEnhancements.fix: Apply a consistent LUT. Warm grade for lifestyle/personal. Cool/clean for tech. Boost saturation 10-15%.
visualEnhancements.toolSuggestion: DaVinci Resolve colour panel or LUTS

visualEnhancements.issue: Key information may only be spoken, not shown
visualEnhancements.fix: Add animated text for every key stat, tip, or quote. Use bold sans-serif font at minimum 60pt.

visualEnhancements.issue: Talking head may be too centred and static
visualEnhancements.fix: Use rule-of-thirds. Leave space on the side where the subject is looking. Slight zoom-in for emphasis moments.

audioEnhancements.issue: VO may have inconsistent levels or room noise
audioEnhancements.fix: Normalise voice to -12dB LUFS. Apply noise gate at -40dB. Use Audacity or Premiere Essential Sound.

audioEnhancements.issue: Music may overpower or underwhelm the voice
audioEnhancements.fix: Set music at -20dB under voice. Use ducking: -6dB more during speech, restore on B-roll.

editingEnhancements.issue: Long pauses and filler words slow down the video
editingEnhancements.fix: Remove all pauses over 0.5 seconds and all 'um', 'uh', 'like' filler words. Target 150-180 words per minute delivery.

editingEnhancements.issue: Talking head with no cutaways reduces engagement
editingEnhancements.fix: Cut to relevant B-roll every 45-60 seconds minimum. Screen recordings, hands-on demos, or stock footage.

editingEnhancements.issue: Last 20 seconds may not have a clear next-video prompt
editingEnhancements.fix: Add YouTube end screen cards. Script a verbal CTA to a related video. 'If you liked this, watch this one next.'

metadataEnhancements.issue: First 150 characters may not include target keyword or compelling hook
metadataEnhancements.fix: Rewrite opening: "video-editing guide: [specific benefit]. In this video I show you [result] without [common problem]."

metadataEnhancements.issue: No timestamp chapters reduce searchability and retention
metadataEnhancements.fix: Add chapters in description. YouTube indexes chapter titles for search. Minimum 3 chapters.

repurposeOpportunities.segment: Best tip segment (identify highest-value 30-60 second moment)
repurposeOpportunities.editingNotes: 9:16 crop. Add captions. Hook overlay in first 3 seconds. Remove YouTube-specific references.
repurposeOpportunities.estimatedExtraReach: 500-5000 additional views per Reel on Instagram

repurposeOpportunities.editingNotes: Vertical 9:16. Under 60 seconds. No CTA to subscribe at start (violates Shorts policy).
10 slides max. First slide is the hook. Last slide is the CTA. Screenshot key frames or design new slides.
repurposeOpportunities.estimatedExtraReach: High save rate = high reach on Instagram carousel format

thumbnailVariants.concept: Creator face with strong emotion (shock/excitement) + bold text result
thumbnailVariants.colourScheme: High contrast: white text on dark background
thumbnailVariants.testingNote: Run as default for first 48 hours, check CTR in YouTube Studio

thumbnailVariants.concept: Before/after split screen with dramatic difference visible
thumbnailVariants.testingNote: Switch to this if variant A CTR is below 4% after 500 impressions

thumbnailVariants.concept: Text-heavy graphic with 3-5 bullet points of key takeaways
thumbnailVariants.colourScheme: Clean white with brand colour accent
thumbnailVariants.testingNote: Test after establishing channel branding consistency

accessibilityNotes: Add auto-generated captions and review for accuracy (YouTube auto-captions have ~80% accuracy)
Add chapter titles that describe content for screen readers
Avoid relying solely on colour to convey information in graphics
Speak at a clear, moderate pace (150 WPM max) for hearing-impaired viewers
